'''bavumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xoomij|xoomij]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xoomij|xoomij]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bavumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bævimith|bævimith]] || [[word:bævimij|bævimij]] || [[word:bævimish|bævimish]] || [[word:bævimi|bævimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bavuvumuth|bavuvumuth]] || [[word:bavuvumuj|bavuvumuj]] || [[word:bavuvumush|bavuvumush]] || [[word:bavuvumu|bavuvumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bavumuth|bavumuth]] || [[word:bavumuj|bavumuj]] || [[word:bavumush|bavumush]] || [[word:bavumu|bavumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bavufmuth|bavufmuth]] || [[word:bavufmuj|bavufmuj]] || [[word:bavufmush|bavufmush]] || [[word:bavufmuf|bavufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bavumuthu|bavumuthu]] || [[word:bavumuju|bavumuju]] || [[word:bavumushu|bavumushu]] || [[word:bavumuku|bavumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bavumuth|bavumuth]] || [[word:bavumuj|bavumuj]] || [[word:bavumush|bavumush]] || [[word:bavumu|bavumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bavumuthul|bavumuthul]] || [[word:bavumujul|bavumujul]] || [[word:bavumushul|bavumushul]] || [[word:bavumukul|bavumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bavumuthuthu|bavumuthuthu]] || [[word:bavumujuju|bavumujuju]] || [[word:bavumushushu|bavumushushu]] || [[word:bavumuku|bavumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bavumuthun|bavumuthun]] || [[word:bavumujun|bavumujun]] || [[word:bavumushun|bavumushun]] || [[word:bavumukun|bavumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bavumuthuoro|bavumuthuoro]] || [[word:bavumujuoro|bavumujuoro]] || [[word:bavumushuoro|bavumushuoro]] || [[word:bavumukuoro|bavumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
